purpose: Swap dynamicVisuals.ts's Phase A stub watercolor generator (MOCK-02-001) for a real import of the @rotheric/visuals git dependency (pinned to tag visuals-v0.1.2), with the DYNAMIC_GENERATORS registry's exported signature and every downstream call site left byte-identical (AC-DEP-1). Adds the git dependency to app/package.json/package-lock.json (AC-DEP-2's bundling/no-Node-deps requirement verified against the real package).

public_api.name: DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor
public_api.signature: (style: StyleToken, kind: 'banner', render?: Record<string, unknown>) => string
public_api.description: Unchanged from Phase A (S2). Calls the real @rotheric/visuals randomizeParams()+renderSVG({params}) instead of the removed inline stub; forces few.chat's banner envelope (420x96) and forwards `render` as composition knobs before the pinned style/forced envelope are applied. Returns only the `svg` field of renderSVG's {svg, id} result.

public_api.name: StyleToken
public_api.description: Unchanged from Phase A — still derived by indexing off ThemeManifest, never hand-redeclared.

owned_data: the randomizeParams()+override call shape (unchanged from Phase A)
the forced banner envelope constant (BANNER_FORMAT, unchanged)
dependencies_allowed: @/src/themes/schema (type-only import of ThemeManifest, unchanged from Phase A)
@rotheric/visuals (NEW, Phase B — the real git-dependency package; sole import site enforced by AC-STRUCT-4)
dependencies_forbidden: any other app/src module importing @rotheric/visuals directly (AC-STRUCT-4 single-import-site invariant)
zod at runtime (Boundary Rule 1 — unaffected by this story)
external_ports: @rotheric/visuals (git dependency, package.json: "@rotheric/visuals": "github:rotheric/ink#visuals-v0.1.2", resolved in package-lock.json to the immutable visuals-v0.1.2 tag commit 0f27a822c03a07c5b3fe00ddd927b10a36cc29ab)
test_targets: app/tests/unit/themes/treatments.test.ts (AC-UX-1, AC-STRUCT-3, AC-STRUCT-6 re-verified against the real package)
app/tests/unit/hooks/useDynamicBanner.test.ts (unchanged; already calls DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor directly, now exercising the real package with no test edits needed)
